items.title: Nintendo Sues US Govt Over Trump’s Illegal Tariffs
items.summary:
Nintendo has an infamous history of suing people left, right, and centre for one reason or another. Usually, the gaming giant targets companies and/or individuals, but now it’s reportedly setting its sights on the US government itself. However, rather than copyright infringement or something similar, Nintendo is suing the US government over its tariff policy. […]

If you want to get the same reactive backlighting for your TVs of 40 to 85 inches in size while saving a bit more without the smart light bars in the above package, you can find Govee’s three standard TV Backlight 3 Lite sizes starting from $54.99 shipped right now.
